name: QA 662
description:
PCP QA Test No. 662

Exercises REST API functionality using python requests module



Copyright (c) 2013-2015,2019 Red Hat.



Debugging note:

1. touch 662.wait

2. ./662

3. when pmproxy is setup, the test will wait for 662.wait to be

removed, giving time to poke pmproxy, attach gdb, whatever

before the test resumes



seq=`basename $0`

echo "QA output created by $seq"

**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 662

Exercises REST API functionality using python requests module

Copyright (c) 2013-2015,2019 Red Hat.

Debugging note:

  1. touch 662.wait

  2. ./662

  3. when pmproxy is setup, the test will wait for 662.wait to be

removed, giving time to poke pmproxy, attach gdb, whatever

before the test resumes

seq=basename $0

echo "QA output created by $seq"

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204-container reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 662

Exercises REST API functionality using python requests module



Copyright (c) 2013-2015,2019 Red Hat.



Debugging note:

1. touch 662.wait

2. ./662

3. when pmproxy is setup, the test will wait for 662.wait to be

removed, giving time to poke pmproxy, attach gdb, whatever

before the test resumes



seq=`basename $0`

echo "QA output created by $seq"

**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204-container reproduce
